text:
6: Part 1 (6—①, Roku (Ichi)) is the 23 rd volume of the Hunter × Hunter manga series. It was released by Shueisha on March 3 rd , 2006 in Japan and by Viz Media on November 4 th , 2008 in English.

247. 6: Part 4 (6—④, Roku (Yon))

Summary

After defeating several soldier Ants from Leol's squad, Killua is struck by multiple bullets from an unknown sniper that turns out to be an Ant named Ikalgo. Killua is led to an underground lake where the Ortho Siblings use their Needlefish De Darts ability to wound Killua and nearly kill him, but he utilizes his own ability and his knowledge of darts to survive the final strike, decapitating the brother and sister.

Killua begins to bleed out from the numerous wounds, but Ikalgo returns and carries him to a secret clinic as quickly as he can. Elsewhere in a desert, the invisible figure following Gon finally reveals himself and says that his name is Meleoron. He reveals his abilities and tells Gon that he plans to take down the King since he killed Peggy (who was his foster father when they were human), asking Gon if he wants to team up.

Meanwhile, in the palace, the King spends his time learning board games like Shogi and Go, forcing the national champions to play against him. After learning the rules of a game called Gungi, he has trouble beating the champion, but is confident that he can disrupt her rhythm eventually.

In Peijin, Morel uses his Deep Purple 's "Smoke Troopers" to take out the soldiers manipulated by Neferpitou, but he is interrupted by a confident Cheetu, who uses his ability to transport Morel to a Nen space where he has to tag the Ant in a certain amount of time in order to escape. As Knov uses his Hide and Seek ability to escape Pitou's puppets, he spots Flutter providing reconnaissance for the Ants and plans to take him out. While the King is still unable to defeat the Gungi champion, Morel's patience against Cheetu pays off and he has the Ant cornered, but Cheetu suddenly develops a new ability.
